Vendored: bashlex 0.18
Upstream: https://github.com/idank/bashlex
Obtained via: pip download bashlex==0.18 --no-deps
License: GPL-3.0-or-later (GPLv3+). See ./LICENSE (full GPLv3 text).

COPYLEFT NOTICE
bashlex is licensed GPLv3+. `.codex/hooks/bash-guard-detect.py` imports it, so
that detector is a derivative work and is likewise GPLv3+. This is accepted
deliberately: it is developer-harness tooling (a local PreToolUse hook), not part
of the shipped site or any distributed product, and this repo is
public so its source is available. The GPLv3 obligation is scoped to this
vendored parser and the hook file that imports it; it does not relicense the rest
of the repository.

Dependency-free on Python >= 3.4.
